LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR AN ASSIGNMENT ORDER AND ACCOUNTING OF FUNDS IS GRANTED IN PART. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of And Mtn For An Assignment Order And Accounting Of Funds
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE, INCORPORATED'S Motion For An Assignment Order And Accounting Of Funds is Granted in part. No opposition was filed. The Court grants the request for assignment. The Court denies the request for accounting of funds. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
